items.title: server.mjs is becoming a platform bottleneck
items.reason: Routing, data fetching, scoring, financial modeling, timeline, search, and static serving are concentrated in one file.
items.impact: Feature velocity will drop and regression risk will rise as Supply Chain Intelligence and AI Search are added.
items.recommendation: Split into modules: routes, services, repositories, search, master-data, timeline, financial, and shared source metadata.

items.title: Generated Master/Search JSON is committed as large artifacts
items.reason: Current search index is 7.68 MB; future announcements/news/supply-chain events will expand it quickly.
items.impact: Repository size, code review noise, deployment slug size, and merge conflicts will worsen.
items.recommendation: Move generated artifacts to build cache or object storage, keep source seeds and deterministic builder in git.

items.title: Search ranking is deterministic but not yet relevance-trained
items.reason: Weights are rule-based and do not yet use click feedback, user intent, or domain-specific synonym expansion.
items.impact: Long-tail searches may be correct but not ideal as topics, products, and news grow.
items.recommendation: Introduce query evaluation sets, click telemetry, and a versioned ranking profile before AI Search.

items.title: Master Data update is manual
items.reason: The builder supports incremental scope, but no scheduled job or stale alert exists yet.
items.impact: Listings, ETF changes, renamed companies, or delistings can become stale without operational discipline.
items.recommendation: Add scheduled refresh, diff report, source failure alerting, and approval gate for changed identifiers.

items.title: Frontend is still a large imperative app file
items.reason: Global Search was added into existing app.js, which already owns charts, timeline, financial UI, alerts, and watchlist.
items.impact: UI behavior will become hard to test and accessibility improvements will be slower.
items.recommendation: Modularize frontend by feature and introduce a small state/store layer before Portfolio and AI Chat.

questions.biggestDebt: server.mjs and public/app.js are now too broad for a long-lived AI research platform.
questions.nextBestStep: Stabilize Master Data in Preview, then extract Master/Search services before Phase 3 expands relation data.
twoDayRefactorTop3: Extract server modules and route handlers.
Move generated search artifacts out of normal code review flow or add generated-file review policy.
Create shared source metadata and error contracts used by all APIs.
questions.betterProductDesign: Make Global Search the command center: query results should route into stocks, topics, products, events, and eventually AI answers, not only a topbar utility.
